xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: 11th Floor, Sun Paradise Business Plaza, B Wing, Senapati Bapat Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai-400 013
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: 11th Floor, Sun Paradise Business Plaza, B Wing, Senapati Bapat Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai-400 013
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Printing of Books on behalf of the Publishers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProductOrServiceSoldByTheEntit: Printing of magazines and other periodicals, books and brochures, maps, atlases, posters etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: The Company caters to its customers through different segments: Publisher Segment: This segment focuses on providing bulk printing services and other associated services to the publishers. Retail Segment: Under this category, the Company serves retail customers (end users) directly through various channel partners such as Amazon, Flipkart, etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarksStakeHolderGroupFromWho: For details on investor complaints received and resolved, refer to the ‘Investor complaints’ available in the Corporate Governance report of this Annual Report.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Risk: A lack of sufficient and transparent data security and privacy protocols can cause considerable financial and reputational damage, eroding customer trust and confidence.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company has implemented robust cyber security measures, including anti-virus, antispyware, firewalls, and off- site data backup. The organisation is committed to constantly enhancing and upgrading its tools and solutions to protect against cyberattacks and minimise damage. These measures encompass a privacy policy, data privacy impact assessments, cyber insurance and data leakage protection monitoring.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Opportunity: The Company can by way of digitization improve the customer experience, expand its operational reach, and enhance overall presence
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company has its own capabilities to create and expand digitization by selling the book through their own e-commerce platform ie. Bookscape etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MaterialIssueIdentified: Enabling Business To Go Green and Promotion of Green Paper-FSC Certification
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Opportunity: Creating long- term value for all stakeholders by enabling the listing of sustainable green paper via Amazon, Flipkart portal thereby creating access to green and Eco- friendly books.
Risk: The challenges in attracting and retaining skilled employees may face difficulties in achieving its business objectives, and could encounter problems with productivity and performance
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company strive to create an inclusive workplace environment that offers equal employment opportunities with competitive compensation and benefits. The Company has also the policy related to employee’s rights i.e Human Right Policy, Sexual Harassment policy. Any instances of discrimination or violations of equal opportunity can be reported to the HR via mail or can approach to HR personally.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Opportunity: It creates transparency between the Shareholders and the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Intimation to the stock exchanges and dissemination of the same on the website on timely basis. Maintaining a track record of all the Compliance in the Excel Sheet.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Opportunity: Creation of safe and healthy working environmentfor all the employees, specially to the workers who are working in the Plants.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company emphasis on placing safety as a pre-requisite across all its Plants. The Company strives to provide a safe working environment by ensuring strict adherence to policies and procedures. The Company has provided an insurance policy to all employees and workers of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio:
Successfully completed Surveillance audit without any non-conformities.
ISO 9000:2015 Successfully completed Recertification Audit by Intertek India without any non-conformities.
ISO 27001:2013 We successfully completed Surveillance Audit of Information Security Management System (ISMS) without any non-conformity.
FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) Chain of Custody Certification (CoC) FSC CoC Certification completed Surveillance Audit of all the plants including Repro Lower Parel Office without any non-conformity. It focusses on Green Initiative and sustainable use of forest product.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar:
The Company has launched their own e-commerce platform to sell books in the form of website and app.
The Company aims to position itself as the topnotch seller of Books online.
Tech Integration for digital Business.

The Company has launched their own e-commerce platform to sell books in the form of website and app. The Company aims to position itself as the topnotch seller of Books online. Tech Integration for digital Business.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PerformanceOfTheEntityAgainstT: Visibilty of the e-commerce platform in the ranking of top 5 selllers for books online. Phase-1 of data analytic platform in activation.
Visibilty of the e-commerce platform in the ranking of top 5 selllers for books online. Phase-1 of data analytic platform in activation.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: The Company has adopted the ESG Policy and the Board of Directors has approved the policy at the Board Meeting held on November 03, 2024
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: The Company’s BoD and KMPs are regularly briefed on an array of topics,including strategy, business operations, markets, performance, organisation structure, economy, risk management framework, regulatory updates, future outlook, social and governance aspects, information technology including cyber security, their roles, rights and responsibilities and major developments and updates.

The Company’s BoD and KMPs are regularly briefed on an array of topics,including strategy, business operations, markets, performance, organisation structure, economy, risk management framework, regulatory updates, future outlook, social and governance aspects, information technology including cyber security, their roles, rights and responsibilities and major developments and updates.
Confidentiality on the Code of Conduct, Behavioural training, Information Security Management System (ISMS), Skill upgradation training, Training sessions by Senior Level Management

Personality development, Time management, 5S Awareness and workplace management training, Technical training, Behavioural training, ISO awareness, ISMS awareness, FSC awareness, code of conduct, Mockdrill, Fire fighting and fire ball training etc. It helps to improve and sharpen their skillsets. Also, getting various tangible and intangible benefits due to providing various training programme to employee.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: Yes, the Company has a robust code of anti-corruption or anti-bribery policy to conduct all of our business in an honest and ethical manner. We take a zero tolerance approach to bribery and corruption and are committed to acting professionally, fairly and with integrity in all our business dealings and relationships, wherever we operate, and to implementing and enforcing effective systems to counter bribery. The policy can be assessed at https://investor.reproindialtd.com/pdf/2020-2021/ AntiBriberyandAntiCorruption_18032021.pdf
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: Not Applicable, as zero cases of corruption or conflicts of interest were recorded during the reporting period.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHaveProcesse:
Yes, the Code of Conduct for the Board of Directors and Senior Management Personnel (‘Code’) offers guidance to avoid any transactions or actions that might influence these individuals to act against the Company’s best interests.
The Code is available on the Company’s website at: https://investor.reproindialtd.com/pdf/2018-2019/Ethical%20Code%20of%20Conduct%20 Policy.pdf
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: All packaging waste are collected, stored, sorting as per different type and then sold to the authorized vendor for dispose or recycling as per their process.

All paper waste are sold back to the paper mills, who are into process of manufacturing paper of recycling grade
Waste Ink collected and disposed via Mumbai Waste Management Ltd.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToAddressTheWasteCol: The Surat base manufacturing facility have initiated to register under EPR.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:IndicateInPutMaterial: Percentage of paper used with FSC certified and recycle grade
Percentage of paper used with FSC certified and recycle grade
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Yes, the Company encourages employees and workers to share their concerns with their reporting heads and HR. The Group has implemented a Whistleblower Policy and Vigil Mechanism for reporting grievances across various matters. Under the Prevention of Sexual Harassment Policy, Internal Committee panels are established to promptly address any incidents related to sexual harassment.

Yes, the Company encourages employees and workers to share their concerns with their reporting heads and HR. The Group has implemented a Whistleblower Policy and Vigil Mechanism for reporting grievances across various matters. Under the Prevention of Sexual Harassment Policy, Internal Committee panels are established to promptly address any incidents related to sexual harassment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: Yes, the Company has a well-defined safety process in place for all its employees to prevent any accidental hazards in its offices. The processes are communicated to all the employees on a periodic basis.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: Given the nature of the business, this indicator is not directly applicable. However, there are procedures to assess the risk on routine and non- routine basis and work- related hazards.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE:
The Company places great emphasis on the safety and well-being of all its employees and strives to provide a safe work environment to all. All the employees are mandated to participate in Mock Drill trainings for Fire Safety and Flood/Earthquake.
Evacuation on a periodic basis as a part of routine safety measures. In order to prevent unauthorised access to the office premises for the safety of employees, biometric scans and electromagnetic locks are placed on the main entrances to the premises. All office floors are well-equipped with CCTV cameras and other security systems. Furthermore, the Company ensures that all the security personnel are regularly trained on fire and flood/earthquake evacuation.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: The Company has proactively undertaken assessments for all its branches. Basis the assessments, necessary renovations are being carried out at offices. Worn out chairs and old ACs are replaced. Power back-ups are installed. The assessments for the plant locations are still on-going and corrective actions are in process at different stages. It is expected to be completed in the next year.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: The Company ensures that applicable taxes and statutory dues are appropriately deducted and deposited by the value chain partners inaccordance with the laws and regulations. Challans and proof of deductions are submitted on a regular basis. This is reviewed as a part of the internal and statutory audit.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif:
Any individual or group of individuals that adds value or has potential to impact the Company is identified as a key stakeholder. The following stakeholder groups have been identified:
Internal Stakeholders l Employees l Board of Directors
External Stakeholders l Shareholders l Investors l Customers l Regulatory Bodies l Suppliers l Government
This is an ongoing process that aids to understanding and addressing stakeholder expectations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Safe and inclusive workplace for employees and offer opportunities for their professional growth. Discuss feedback and redress any grievances.
The purpose to offer pertinent information and comprehend stakeholder’s prespectives on the Company’s and its subsidiaries.Also to resolve any grievances
• To drive more business for us in return engaging more business for our customers too through our specialised services and distribution model. • Better prices and ease of payment
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: The Company has implemented the Code of Conduct, which outlines ethical business practices. The Code of Conduct for Directors and Senior Management provides guidance to maintain accountability, integrity, and the highest standard of corporate governance, while the Vigil Mechanism, which includes a Whistle Blower Policy, provides a framework for responsible and secure reporting on concerns of unethical behaviour, actual or suspected fraud, or violation of human rights to directors, employees, customers and all stakeholders. All the employees are required to report any suspected or actual breaches of the Code, company policies, or the law. The complaint is then taken up with the respective decision maker and the resolution is tracked to closure under supervision of the Corporate HR.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: The Company demonstrates zero tolerance to all forms of harassment at workplace, including sexual harassment at the workplace, and considers all such actions as unacceptable conduct. The Company encourages reporting of any harassment concerns and is responsive to complaints about harassment or other unwelcome or offensive conduct. As part of the policy, the complainant will not suffer any harassment, retaliation or adverse employment condition upon this reporting. The policy is made aware to all employees through regular training and awareness on the subject and confidentiality clauses are clearly stated. Committees are constituted to conduct enquiries into the complaints of sexual harassment and to recommend appropriate action, wherever required
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: There have been no significant human rights grievances / complaints warranting modification / introduction of business processes.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti:
We implement the 3 approach - reduce, reuse, and recycle - for effective waste management at all our plant location. Furthermore, we are trying to eliminate the use of hazardous and toxic chemicals like Ink that is used for printing the books, magazines or aticles etc.
Some of the hazardous waste has been collected, stored, transported and sent for disposal to authorised vendor and all of the non-hazardous waste like plastic, paper, wood, etc. is sent for recycling.
At the Mumbai office, processes are identified to eliminate the use of paper by adopting digital alternatives, such as use of e-guides in place of paper.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:LocationOfOperationsOrOffices: Repro India Limited, (Unit No. 2), Plot No. 89 to 93 & 165, SEZ, Sachin, Surat-394230, Gujarat.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameAndBriefDetailsOfProject: Printing Facility has been set up in the SEZ zone, for printing of Educational Books.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:EIANotificationNumber: EIA has been taken by SEZ Developer, M/S. DGDC LTD
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TheEntityHasNotApplicableEnvir: Yes, given the nature of business, the company is in compliance with all the applicable environmental norms
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DiscloseAnySignificantAdverseI: Given the nature of the business, there has been no adverse impact to the environment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: All of the non-hazardous waste like plastic, paper, wood, etc. is sent for recycling
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:OutcomeOfTheInitiative: Zero waste to the landfills and can reuse the waste in other forms.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: All of the hazardous waste has been collected, stored, transported and sent for disposal to the Authorised vendor.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:OutcomeOfTheInitiative: Reduced hazardous waste going to landfill and efforts were made to make land less polluted.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: Chemicals and Allied Products Export Promotion Council (CAPEXIL)
Export Promotion Council for EOUs & SEZs (EPCES)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: The Company has various mechanisms to receive and redress grievances of various stakeholders. In case any grievances are received from the community members, concerned person can reach out to the company’s CSR Team. The grievances are responded by the CSR team or directed to the relevant department for resolution and appropriate actions are taken to address the grievances.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:CSRProject: Repro's Bhiwandi Plant Team visit to Touch Foundation's Balgram at Vihigav, Kasara, 2024-23, 2023-22
Distribution of educational material, contributed funds, sweets, cloths, food grains, school stationary item etc distribution among children
Sharing and counselling of children for their career development
Shramadan' initiative was driven to create water-harvesting structure, to overcome chronic water scarcity, particularly during hot season
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: Customer complaints are received by e-mail. Such issues are then escalated to competent internal authority for redressal and appropriate responses along with action plan are mailed to customer from business team within 2 business days.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfThePolicyOnCyberSecur: Yes, the Company has a Cyber Security Policy in place that covers all aspects of cyber risk for IT and business areas. The Company is committed to establishing and improving cyber security posture and minimizing its exposure to such risks.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: There are no corrective actions taken or underway presently with respect to Cyber Security and Data Privacy.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImpactOfDataBreachesE: There are no corrective actions taken or underway presently with respect to Cyber Security and Data Privacy.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: The information relating to various services provided by the Company is available on the Company’s website at www.reproindialtd.com In addition the Company uses various social media and digital platforms to disseminate information of its services / products.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToInformAndEducateCo: Print on demand business solutions are designed to minimise raw material wastage as well as promote zero wastages of finished goods due to obsolescence. Customers are encouraged to adopt repro offerings that uphold the spirit of sustainability as well as curb the possibilities of product piracy. Repro tamper proof packaging ensures that products are delivered safely and transit pilferages if any are reported for corrective actions.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsInPlaceToInformConsu: Customers are informed over mail in advance regarding any deviation from committed services or expiry of commercial contract due to which services can be disrupted. Services are extended or discontinued based on mutual agreement.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProductInformationOnT: Customer satisfaction survey is done annually through our Quality assurance team via mails seeking product and service level feedbacks from competent authorities assigned from the customer side.
